projectDescription: A modern, multi-tenant content management system built on Laravel with AI writing tools, a visual page builder, a RESTful API, and built-in billing.
keyFeatures: Multi-tenant subdomain architecture — each tenant gets an isolated site on their own subdomain
Visual block-based page editor with drag-and-drop reordering (rich text, images, CTAs, video, accordion, and more)
AI chat and agent mode powered by OpenAI — draft posts, search content, and generate featured images from the admin
RESTful API v1 with Laravel Sanctum authentication for programmatic access to posts
Role-based access control with seven roles (super-admin → viewer) and granular permissions
Configurable homepage — choose between a posts feed, a custom Page, or a marketing landing template
Outbound webhook automation via n8n triggered on post publish and update events
Stripe billing integration via Laravel Cashier
Transactional email via Postmark with bounce/complaint handling and deliverability dashboard
Brand customization — colors, typography, logo, favicon, and custom CSS per tenant
publicApiSurface: GET /api/v1/posts — list published posts (paginated, tenant-scoped, no auth required)
GET /api/v1/posts/{id} — fetch a single post by numeric ID
GET /api/v1/posts/by-slug/{slug} — fetch a single post by URL slug
POST /api/v1/posts — create a post (requires Sanctum Bearer token)
PATCH /api/v1/posts/{id} — update a post (requires Sanctum Bearer token)
DELETE /api/v1/posts/{id} — delete a post (requires Sanctum Bearer token)
POST /api/integrations/n8n/ingest — receive callback payloads from n8n (shared-secret protected)
